title: Kelona
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Kelona''' was the second [[Standard month/Legends|month]] of the [[Tapani calendar]]. It followed [[Elona]], and was followed by [[Tapani Day]] and [[Selona]].

==Sources==
*<!-- 1997-06-XX -->''[[Player's Guide to Tapani]]''
*<!-- 1997-07-28 -->''[[Lords of the Expanse]]''
